{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324002648B3777BA2353B2E0C2032"}"},"total":60},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7591501016361911064","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的挺不错的，人物情感刻画的不错，已经比番茄大部分人好了，没有特别莫名其妙的桥段，设定也挺有意思，期待后续发展，加油✊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767536093,"group_id":"7438960274897390617","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/96o405a7kalS0BZOs3WhfwAFC0iImdsYnan+kvJGCF","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875250&x-signature=oRrJGA6Uz5DR%2BfCISt8M%2BfcegOI%3D","user_id":"3571683159975780","user_name":"老呦怪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3571683159975780","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1730234187,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7438960274897390617","book_info":{"abstract":"［慢热］+［半无敌］+［伪群像］
张非凡穿越了，老套路顶着无数魂环的泥头车司机一个帅气的甩尾漂移，带走了张非凡平凡的生活…再次醒来时，他已经穿越到了自己所玩的一款名为《原神》的游戏当中。
而所谓金手指系统的到来也让张非凡想平平静静生活下的心思彻底熄灭了。
而与此同时不光原神世界，整个诸天万界的画风渐渐变得有些怪异起来。
二乔：迪奥，你听见了吗？风停了。
温迪：若你困于无风之地，我必奏响高天之歌。
钟离：赵空城，你看好了！
赵空城：嗯…嗯！
钟离：这一招会很帅
四谷见子：我看不见我看不见！
胡桃：真的看不见吗？（拿出小幽灵晃了一下）
鬼舞辻无惨：区区人类！
雷电影：你把生命当什么了！
炭治郎：影小姐，竟然要对付无惨，那你身旁这只鬼就交给我了。
张非凡：一斗，快跑！
张非凡：对不起啊，小智，喷火龙，因为保护我受伤了。
小智：没关系，我会带着其他精灵连带喷火龙那份一起努力的！
张非凡：很有精神，那就带上这只屑狐狸和风魔龙吧！
本书故事剧情包括《原神》《JOJO的奇妙冒险》《斩神》《鬼灭》《看得见女孩》《岸边露伴一动不动》《阿贡》《熊出没》《蜡笔小新》《恶灵骑士》…","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3c1ee5f1990827a8debd45382d87f491","author":"惊门山火","author_id":"","book_id":"7438960274897390617","book_name":"带着原神，走向诸天万界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0c0c0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6742人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7438960335928689177","read_count":"6742","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"416823"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.8","serial_count":"166","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,诸天万界,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ocaa09c19e2ee1545643f2b887c40b0b3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779467208&x-signature=3SkfwomKgoL%2Bt%2FsMoe07Ncwe9XQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2071947244763501","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"44"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324002648B3777BA2353B2E0C2032"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小 很帅很棒，可惜了，不平凡的人需要不平凡的人生衬托。
